##PROFILE
;;SOURCE_DSN=TCPIP.TCPPARMS(PROFILE1)
; sample PROFILE.TCPIP excerpt
HOSTNAME MVSTCPIP
DEVICE OSA2080 MPCIPA
LINK ETH0LINK IPAQENET OSA2080
HOME 10.1.1.2 ETH0LINK
